meanings.definition: the act of mobilizing for a common purpose
examples: the bell was a signal for the rallying of the whole neighborhood

meanings.definition: the feat of mustering strength for a renewed effort
examples: he singled to start a rally in the 9th inning
he feared the rallying of their troops for a counterattack

meanings.definition: call to arms; of military personnel

examples: muster the courage to do something
The jilted lover soon rallied and found new friends

meanings.definition: harass with persistent criticism or carping
examples: The children teased the new teacher
Don't ride me so hard over my failure
His fellow workers razzed him when he wore a jacket and tie

meanings.definition: rousing or recalling to unity and renewed effort
